title: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
summary: The CEO of UK retailer Next warns of a dramatic decline in entry-level job opportunities. The company now receives double the applicants for each position compared to two years ago, reflecting intense competition for junior roles.
content: Lord Wolfson tells the BBC Next now typically receives double the number of applicants for one role than it did two years ago.

zh.title: Next首席执行官警告入门级工作机会出现"戏剧性"下滑
zh.summary: 英国零售商Next的首席执行官警告入门级工作机会出现戏剧性下降。与两年前相比，该公司每个职位现在收到的申请人数增加了一倍，反映出初级职位竞争激烈。

title: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
summary: The UK government pledges to implement social media restrictions for children under 16 by the end of 2026. Tech minister Liz Kendall announced the government will publish its consultation response in summer, detailing specific restrictions.
content: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.

zh.title: 政府承诺在年底前实施16岁以下社媒限制
zh.summary: 英国政府承诺在2026年底前对16岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制。科技部长莉兹·肯德尔宣布政府将在夏季发布咨询回复，详细说明具体限制措施。

title: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
summary: Custard apples are gaining popularity due to hardy plants and unique creamy fruit flavor. However, the delicate nature of the fruit presents significant challenges for international export and commercialization.
content: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.

zh.title: 味道如蛋挞的水果的崛起
zh.summary: 由于植株强壮和独特的奶油状果实风味，番荔枝越来越受欢迎。然而，这种水果娇嫩的性质给国际出口和商业化带来了重大挑战。

title: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Tariffs eased. Trust didn't.
summary: While U.S.-China tariffs have been eased, underlying trust between the two countries remains strained. Chinese companies continue to pursue the U.S. as their largest consumer market while navigating local concerns about their operations.
content: As the largest consumer market globally, the U.S. still remains a prized destination for Chinese companies that are finding ways to address local concerns.

zh.title: CNBC《中国连接》通讯：关税缓解了，信任没有
zh.summary: 尽管美中关税已经缓解，但两国之间的根本信任仍然紧张。中国公司继续将美国视为最大消费市场，同时应对对其运营的当地关注。

title: It's time for Nvidia to take a page out of Apple's playbook and do more for investors
summary: Nvidia should follow Apple's approach and do more for shareholders to cement its status as a solid grower. The commentary suggests the company needs to enhance returns for investors beyond current performance.
content: It's time for Nvidia to admit its status as a solid grower and do more for shareholders than it already has.

zh.title: 是时候让英伟达学习苹果的做法，为投资者做得更多
zh.summary: 英伟达应该效仿苹果的做法，为股东做得更多，以巩固其稳健增长者的地位。评论表明该公司需要超越目前的表现，为投资者提高回报。

title: This beach hut costs the same as a three-bedroom house
summary: A beach hut in Wales sold for £200,000, matching house prices in the same region. The sale highlights the inflation in seaside property markets.
content: A beach hut has gone on the market for £200,000 - the same price as some houses further along the Welsh coast.

zh.title: 这个海滨小屋的价格与一栋三卧室房子相同
zh.summary: 威尔士的一个海滨小屋以20万英镑的价格售出，与该地区的房价相当。这次出售突显了沿海房地产市场的通胀。

title: These tech stocks have seen bullish 'flag patterns' recently, says Katie Stockton
summary: Tech stocks are currently displaying bullish "flag patterns," a technical chart formation that can signal potential upside. Katie Stockton of Fairlead Strategies explains how this pattern works.
content: The founder of Fairlead Strategies breaks down how this chart formation occurs.

zh.title: 据凯蒂·斯托克顿称，这些科技股最近出现了看涨的"旗形模式"
zh.summary: 科技股目前正在显示看涨的"旗形模式"，这是一种技术图表形成，可能预示向上的潜力。Fairlead Strategies的凯蒂·斯托克顿解释了这种模式的工作原理。

title: Trump links Abraham Accords to Iran deal
summary: Trump is seeking to expand the Abraham Accords by requesting participation from multiple Middle Eastern countries including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and others. The move connects this diplomatic initiative to broader Iran policy discussions.
content: Trump said he has asked countries including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Egypt, Jordan and Turkey to join the Abraham Accords en masse.

zh.title: 特朗普将亚伯拉罕协议与伊朗协议关联起来
zh.summary: 特朗普正在寻求扩大亚伯拉罕协议，要求卡塔尔、沙特阿拉伯等中东多个国家的参与。这一举措将这一外交倡议与更广泛的伊朗政策讨论联系起来。

title: I inherited a house. My CPA says I should sell within a year to avoid capital gains. Is he right?
summary: A homeowner who inherited a house is questioning advice to sell within a year to minimize capital gains taxes and plans to sell to a family member. The question highlights confusion about tax implications of inherited property sales.
content: “We plan to sell it to another family member for the appraised value.”

zh.title: 我继承了一套房子。我的注册会计师说我应该在一年内出售以避免资本利得税。他是对的吗？
zh.summary: 一位继承房产的房主对在一年内出售以最小化资本利得税的建议提出质疑，并计划将其出售给家庭成员。这个问题突出了对继承房产销售的税收影响的困惑。

title: These underdogs are a big reason S&P 500 profit growth is the fastest in nearly 5 years
summary: The S&P 500 is experiencing its fastest profit growth in nearly five years, driven increasingly by smaller companies beyond the Big Seven tech giants. While AI investments boosted tech earnings for years, the broader market is now contributing significantly.
content: Ever since Big Tech went all in on artificial intelligence more than three years ago, seven companies have done the heavy lifting for overall S&P 500 earnings growth. But more recently, the other 493 names in the index have started to pull their weight.

zh.title: 这些黑马是标普500指数利润增长创近5年来最快增速的重要原因
zh.summary: 标普500指数正在经历近五年来最快的利润增长，这主要是由七大科技巨头之外的较小公司推动的。虽然人工智能投资多年来一直推动科技收益增长，但更广泛的市场现在也做出了重大贡献。

title: I’m selling my $1 million home. Will my agent really charge less than a 6% commission?
summary: A homeowner selling a $1 million property questions whether real estate commissions have actually dropped below the traditional 6% following the NAR ruling. The rule change that separated buyer and seller agent compensation is reshaping the market.
content: “I haven’t bought or sold property since the National Association of Realtors ruling that decoupled buyer’s and seller’s agent commissions.”

zh.title: 我在出售一套100万美元的房子,房产中介真的会收取少于6%的佣金吗?
zh.summary: 一名出售100万美元房产的业主对房地产佣金是否确实下降到传统6%以下提出质疑。美国房地产经纪人协会的裁决带来的规则变化将买卖双方代理补偿分开,正在重塑市场。

title: Mastercard’s stock is up 11,000% since its IPO 20 years ago. What comes next?
summary: Mastercard's stock has surged 11,000% since its IPO two decades ago, joining an exclusive group alongside Nvidia and Apple as the best-performing S&P 500 stocks. The question now turns to whether the payments company can sustain such gains.
content: Mastercard is in an elite club. Among S&P 500 components, only Nvidia and Apple shares have performed better over the two-decade span since the card company’s IPO.

zh.title: 万事达卡股票自20年前上市以来上涨了11,000%,接下来会如何?
zh.summary: 万事达卡的股票自20年前上市以来飙升了11,000%,与英伟达和苹果并列成为表现最佳的标普500公司。现在的问题是这家支付公司是否能够维持这样的增长态势。

title: Pope Leo urges AI regulation and warns that some weapons are now beyond human control
summary: Pope Francis warns that AI regulation should not leave data ownership solely to private companies and calls for policies protecting workers and children. He also cautions that certain weapons systems have advanced beyond human control.
content: The first U.S. pope called for ownership of AI data not to be left solely in private hands and for policy makers to protect the rights of workers and children.

zh.title: 教宗利奥呼吁人工智能监管,警告某些武器已超出人类控制范围
zh.summary: 教宗方济各警告说,人工智能监管不应将数据所有权完全留给私人公司,并呼吁制定保护工人和儿童的政策。他还警告称某些武器系统已经超越了人类控制。

title: ‘There is zero transparency’: My friend’s sister controls their mother’s estate. How can we stop her from stealing?
summary: A woman seeks advice on stopping her friend's sister from mismanaging their mother's estate without transparency. The sister allegedly refuses to provide explanations about her handling of the estate, raising concerns about potential theft or misappropriation.
content: “The sister claims she does not have to explain herself to anyone.”

zh.title: "完全没有透明度"：我朋友的妹妹控制着他们母亲的遗产。我们怎样才能阻止她偷窃？
zh.summary: 一名女性寻求建议，以阻止她朋友的妹妹在缺乏透明度的情况下误管理母亲的遗产。据称这位妹妹拒绝解释她如何处理遗产，引发了对潜在盗窃或挪用的担忧。

title: Want to hop off the AI trade? Goldman says buy these stocks that have nothing to do with it
summary: Goldman Sachs recommends stocks with low correlation to AI trends for investors seeking diversification. Companies like Eli Lilly and Fortinet offer exposure less tied to the artificial intelligence frenzy.
content: Stocks such as Eli Lilly and Fortinet are less correlated to the artificial intelligence frenzy, according to Goldman Sachs.

zh.title: 想要跳出人工智能交易吗？高盛说购买这些与人工智能无关的股票
zh.summary: 高盛推荐与人工智能趋势低相关性的股票，为寻求多元化投资的投资者提供选择。礼来和Fortinet等公司提供与人工智能热潮关系不密切的敞口。

title: When are prediction markets most helpful? Evercore ISI has a formula
summary: Evercore ISI strategists have developed guidance on when prediction markets are most effective for forecasting. The analysis helps investors understand the utility of these alternative data sources.
content: Evercore ISI strategists provide insight for when prediction markets are useful for forecasting.

zh.title: 预测市场何时最有帮助?Evercore ISI有一套公式
zh.summary: Evercore ISI策略师已开发出关于预测市场何时对预测最有效的指导。该分析帮助投资者理解这些替代数据来源的实用性。

title: The 5 best affordable hotel brands for your next trip
summary: A comprehensive review of affordable hotel brands across the U.S., evaluating more than two dozen properties to identify the best budget-friendly options for travelers.
content: We reviewed more than 2 dozen hotels to determine our top picks for affordable hotel brands across the U.S

zh.title: 下次旅行的5个最佳经济型酒店品牌
zh.summary: 全面评测美国各地经济型酒店品牌,评估了20多家酒店,以确定旅行者最佳的平价选项。

title: CNBC Points Pro: What type of credit card rewards should I earn?
summary: A credit card rewards expert discusses how to choose between cash back and points-based rewards based on individual preferences. The guidance helps consumers determine which reward type offers better value for their spending patterns.
content: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains how to decide whether cash back or points are a better option.

zh.title: CNBC Points Pro：我应该获得哪种类型的信用卡奖励？
zh.summary: 一位信用卡奖励专家讨论如何根据个人偏好在返现和积分奖励之间进行选择。该指南帮助消费者确定哪种奖励类型为其消费模式提供更好的价值。

title: Gold rises as dollar, oil ease on U.S.-Iran deal prospects
summary: Gold prices rose 1.1% amid easing dollar and oil prices, potentially driven by optimism over U.S.-Iran diplomatic negotiations. Spot gold reached $4,559.07 per ounce while June futures climbed 0.8% to $4,559.80.
content: Spot gold was up 1.1% at $4,559.07 per ounce, as ​of 0736 GMT. U.S. gold futures for June delivery gained 0.8% ​to $4,559.80.

zh.title: 美伊协议前景推动金价上涨，美元和油价走弱
zh.summary: 在美元和油价走弱的背景下，金价上涨1.1%，可能受到美伊外交谈判乐观情绪的驱动。现货黄金达到每盎司4559.07美元，6月期货上涨0.8%至4559.80美元。

title: Iran and U.S. play down hopes for imminent breakthrough in war
summary: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio downplayed expectations for an imminent breakthrough in negotiations with Iran during talks in New Delhi. The U.S. signaled it would exhaust diplomatic channels before pursuing alternative approaches.
content: Secretary of State Marco Rubio told reporters in New Delhi that the U.S. would give diplomacy every chance to succeed before exploring "alternatives".

zh.title: 伊朗和美国淡化近期战争突破的希望
zh.summary: 美国国务卿马可·鲁比奥在新德里的谈判中淡化了与伊朗谈判近期突破的预期。美国表示将在采取替代方案前耗尽外交渠道。

title: European stocks open higher as U.S.-Iran talks continue
summary: European stocks follow Asian gains to higher levels, with Japan's Nikkei 225 reaching a record 65,000 for the first time. The market movement comes as U.S.-Iran diplomatic talks continue. Rising global stock markets reflect investor optimism about economic conditions.
content: Stocks in Europe are tracking their Asian counterparts higher after Japan's Nikkei 225 breached 65,000 for the first time.

zh.title: 美国-伊朗谈判继续，欧洲股市走高
zh.summary: 欧洲股市跟随亚洲股市上涨，日本日经225指数首次创下记录高位65,000点。市场走势与美国-伊朗外交谈判的进行相伴随。全球股市上升反映了投资者对经济状况的乐观情绪。

title: Beware the boom and bust cycle of memory stocks, investors warn amid AI boom
summary: Investors warn that memory chip stocks face boom-and-bust cycles despite the ongoing AI boom, with one expert characterizing the sector as structurally challenged long-term. The warning highlights fundamental difficulties in the memory semiconductor market beyond AI-driven demand spikes. Market observers caution against assuming sustained profitability in the sector.
content: "In the long run, it's a pretty dreadful industry," William de Gale of BlueBox Asset Management, told CNBC's Europe Early Edition on Wednesday.

zh.title: 投资者警告：AI热潮中需谨防存储芯片股的繁荣衰退周期
zh.summary: 投资者警告称，尽管AI热潮仍在继续，存储芯片股仍面临繁荣衰退周期，专家将该行业形容为长期结构性挑战。这一警告突显了存储芯片市场中超越AI驱动需求激增的根本困难。市场观察人士警告不要假设该行业能维持可持续盈利。

title: Delivery Hero shares rise 10% as rival Uber mulls another takeover bid
summary: Delivery Hero's shares rose 10% after confirming a €33-per-share takeover offer from Uber, signaling continued consolidation in the food-delivery sector. The bid values Delivery Hero at a significant premium to recent trading levels. The move intensifies competition among major delivery platforms.
content: Delivery Hero confirmed in a statement on Saturday that it had received a takeover offer from Uber of €33 per share.

zh.title: 优步酝酿新收购出价，Delivery Hero股价上涨10%
zh.summary: Delivery Hero在确认优步每股33欧元的收购报价后，股价上涨10%，这表明食品配送行业的持续整合。该报价对Delivery Hero的估值远高于最近的交易价格。此举加剧了主要配送平台之间的竞争。

title: Singapore reports lower-than-expected inflation for April at 1.8%, revises economic growth higher
summary: Singapore's inflation came in lower than expected at 1.8% for April, with core inflation at 1.4% versus forecasts of 1.7%. The country's central bank revised economic growth expectations upward based on the stronger data. The results suggest cooling price pressures across the economy.
content: Core inflation — which strips out prices of private transport and accommodation —  came in at 1.4%, against estimates of 1.7%.

zh.title: 新加坡4月通胀率低于预期，为1.8%，经济增长预期上调
zh.summary: 新加坡4月通胀率低于预期，仅为1.8%，核心通胀率为1.4%，低于1.7%的预测。该国央行基于更强劲的数据上调了经济增长预期。这些数据表明经济中的物价压力正在冷却。

title: Iran is in the 'process of blinking' over the Strait of Hormuz, Petraeus says
summary: Former CIA director David Petraeus suggested Iran is making concessions on control of the Strait of Hormuz as part of ongoing peace negotiations. A successful deal would result in the crucial shipping channel opening without restrictions. The development marks potential progress in resolving a key geopolitical tension.
content: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions.

zh.title: 彼得雷乌斯称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡问题上正"步步退缩"
zh.summary: 前中情局局长大卫·彼得雷乌斯暗示伊朗在正在进行的和平谈判中在霍尔木兹海峡控制权上做出让步。协议成功将使这一关键航道不受限制地开放。这一进展标志着在解决一个关键地缘政治紧张局势方面取得潜在进展。

title: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
summary: Huawei announced plans for new smartphone chips launching this fall that improve processing capabilities despite ongoing U.S. trade restrictions. The innovation aims to compete with offerings from Nvidia and Apple amid intensifying semiconductor competition. The move underscores China's efforts to reduce technological dependence on restricted suppliers.
content: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.

zh.title: 华为计划今秋推出新智能手机芯片，与英伟达和苹果竞争加剧
zh.summary: 华为宣布计划今秋推出新智能手机芯片，尽管面临美国贸易限制，这些芯片将提升处理能力。这一创新旨在与英伟达和苹果的产品竞争，以应对日益激烈的半导体竞争。这一举措强调了中国减少对受限制供应商的技术依赖的努力。

title: Oil market at 'tank bottoms' in Asia, and Europe isn't far behind, warns market veteran Jeff Currie
summary: Oil market inventories are reaching critically low levels in Asia, with Europe facing similar pressures and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July. The "tank bottom" conditions across regions raise concerns about supply disruptions. The tight energy market conditions globally could impact prices and availability.
content: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, with Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, said Carlyle's Jeff Currie.

zh.title: 石油市场在亚洲"见底"，欧洲也近在咫尺，市场资深人士杰夫·柯里发出警告
zh.summary: 石油市场库存在亚洲正在达到极其危险的低位，欧洲面临类似压力，美国可能在7月面临短缺。各地区"油库见底"的状况引起了人们对供应中断的担忧。全球能源市场的紧张状况可能会影响价格和可用性。

title: 'I don't think I'll ever be able to retire'
summary: Workers in their 70s report they cannot afford to retire due to financial constraints, while some find continued employment keeps them engaged. The shift reflects broader economic pressures on aging populations worldwide. Extended working years are becoming a necessity rather than choice for many.
content: People in their 70s say they cannot afford to quit their jobs, but others say work keeps them young.

zh.title: "我觉得我永远也退不了休"
zh.summary: 年逾七旬的工人表示由于经济困难无法退休，但有些人发现继续工作能让他们保持活力。这种转变反映了全球老龄人口面临的更广泛的经济压力。对许多人来说，延长工作年限正成为一种必然而非选择。

title: How Saudi Arabia's spending spree reached the end of the line
summary: Saudi Arabia's ambitious Vision 2030 spending program, once envisioned as transformative, is now confronting fiscal constraints and reality. The shift marks a reassessment of the kingdom's grand economic diversification plans. Budget pressures are forcing reevaluation of the project's scope and timeline.
content: MBS's Vison 2030 project seemed the stuff of science fiction. Now reality has bitten

zh.title: 沙特阿拉伯的支出狂潮如何走到了尽头
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯雄心勃勃的《2030愿景》支出计划曾被设想为具有变革性的，如今面临财政约束和现实的考验。这一转变标志着该王国对其宏大经济多元化计划的重新评估。预算压力迫使该项目的范围和时间表需要重新评估。

title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
summary: Trump indicated a US-Iran peace deal is progressing and would include reopening the Strait of Hormuz, driving oil prices lower. The potential agreement signals easing geopolitical tensions and could reshape global energy markets.
content: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

zh.title: 对美伊和平协议寄予希望，油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普表示美伊和平协议正在推进，将包括重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，推低油价。这项潜在协议表明地缘政治紧张局势在缓解，可能会重塑全球能源市场。

title: Japan’s Nikkei 225 tops 65,000 for first time as oil falls on Hormuz reopening hopes
summary: Japan's Nikkei 225 index reached a record high of 65,000 as falling oil prices boosted investor risk appetite in lighter holiday trading. The milestone reflects optimism from potential geopolitical de-escalation.
content: Japan’s Nikkei 225 breached 64,000 for the first time Monday as a sharp decline in oil prices lifted risk sentiment in holiday-thinned trading.

zh.title: 日本日经225指数首次突破65000，油价因霍尔木兹海峡重开希望而下跌
zh.summary: 日本日经225指数在较轻假期交易中创历史新高65000，油价下跌提振了投资者风险偏好。这一里程碑反映了对潜在地缘政治缓和的乐观情绪。

title: 'I live in survival mode': The rise of the multi-job workforce
summary: An increasing number of workers are juggling multiple jobs to manage rising living costs and employment insecurity. The trend underscores how economic pressures are reshaping traditional work patterns.
content: More people are taking second jobs as rising costs and insecure work reshape how we earn a living.

zh.title: "我生活在生存模式中"：多职工人的崛起
zh.summary: 越来越多的工人为了应对上升的生活成本和就业不安全感而同时从事多份工作。这一趋势突显了经济压力如何重塑传统工作模式。

title: Beer boom goes flat as breweries call last orders
summary: The UK's brewery and pub sector is contracting as venues close, operating costs rise, and consumer drinking habits shift. The decline reflects broader economic pressures and changing leisure preferences.
content: The UK's brewery scene is shrinking as pubs close, costs rise and drinking habits change.

zh.title: 啤酒行业繁荣不再 英国酿酒厂面临困境
zh.summary: 英国酿酒厂和酒吧业正在收缩，随着酒馆关闭、运营成本上升和消费者饮酒习惯改变。这种衰退反映了更广泛的经济压力和休闲偏好的转变。
